content:
Architectural design software scenario design: a tool for creating the architectural environment

Scenarios design is an important part of architectural design visualization. From scenario creation to environmental design, from landscape configuration to atmosphere creation, scenario design helps designers present the architectural environment. This article will comprehensively evaluate the mainstream architectural design software scenario design function and help architects master scenario design tools.

Corevalue of scenario design

scenarios design plays key functions in architectural design:

  • scenarios creation: architectural design scenarios creation
  • Environmental design: architectural environment design function
  • Landscape configuration: architectural landscape configuration design
  • Atmosphere creation: architectural atmosphere creation function
  • scenarios animation: architectural scenario animation design
